product_overview: Engram Spira is a flashcard study application with an integrated Focus Mode Drawer for Pomodoro-style sessions, customizable dice rewards, and spaced-repetition study modes. The app provides dashboard organization (folders/decks), study flows, and user account management.
core_goals: Provide a lightweight Pomodoro-style Focus Mode accessible from the main app UI with configurable durations, start/stop controls, progress visualization, and reward mechanics.
Surface actionable study flows using spaced repetition (flip + rate) and provide clear navigation between dashboard, folders, decks, and study modes.
Support standard user account management (register, login, password reset) and surface errors/validation clearly.
Allow customization of reward labels and show daily stats to encourage consistent usage.
Keep the Focus Drawer globally available while ensuring predictable open/close behaviors and robust handling of environments lacking WebGL.

features.name: Focus Mode Drawer
features.description: Slide-in drawer that runs Pomodoro-style focus sessions with duration selection, start/stop controls, progress visualization, reward dice popup, editable reward labels, and today's stats.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open focus drawer from the sidebar/navigation button -> See Focus Drawer slide in (translate-x-0) -> See notification permission prompt on first open -> Click plus (+) button to increase focus duration -> See duration displayed in minutes -> Click Start Focus button to start the timer -> See status change to Focusing... -> See timer countdown in MM:SS format -> See circular SVG progress ring animate as time elapses -> On timer completion hear chime sound -> See browser notification -> See RewardPopup with dice animation -> Click X button to close drawer

Navigate to / -> Open focus drawer from the sidebar/navigation button -> Click Start Focus button to start the timer -> Attempt to use Duration Stepper while timer is running -> See duration stepper not present (disabled) -> Click Stop Session button to halt the timer early -> See timer stop and status change to Ready

Navigate to / -> Open focus drawer from the sidebar/navigation button -> Click gear (Settings2) icon to open settings panel -> Edit Dice1 reward input field to a label under 40 characters -> See the updated reward label persist in the drawer -> Close settings panel by clicking backdrop overlay

Navigate to / -> Open focus drawer from the sidebar/navigation button -> Click Start Focus button to start the timer -> Let session complete in an environment without WebGL -> See RewardPopup fail to render 3D animation -> See fallback message or static reward UI instead of dice animation
Navigate to / -> Open focus drawer from the sidebar/navigation button -> Press Escape key -> See Focus Drawer close (translate-x-full)

features.name: User Login
features.description: Sign in with email and password and redirect to the main dashboard on success; validation and server errors are surfaced on failure.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field with registered email -> Fill password input field with correct password -> Click Login button to submit -> POST /api/auth/login is called -> Redirect to / -> See dashboard

Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field with unregistered email -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> POST /api/auth/login returns 401 -> See error message on invalid credentials
Navigate to /login -> Leave email field empty -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See client-side validation error for email field

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new user account using email and password, with inline validation errors shown; on success user is registered and taken to the app.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill email input field with valid email -> Fill password input field meeting requirements -> Click Register button -> POST /api/auth/register is called -> Redirect to / -> See dashboard
Navigate to /register -> Fill email input field with invalid-format email -> Fill password input field -> Click Register button -> See validation errors for email format
Navigate to /register -> Fill email input field with valid email -> Fill password input field with too-short password -> Click Register button -> See validation errors for password requirements

Navigate to /register -> Fill email input field with email already registered -> Fill password input field -> Click Register button -> POST /api/auth/register returns conflict -> See server-side error message about existing account

features.name: Flashcard Study Mode
features.description: Study a deck using card flips and spaced-repetition review ratings; progression records are POSTed to the study API and the session ends when cards are finished.
user_flows: Navigate to /study/:deckId -> GET /api/decks/:deckId/cards is called -> View front of flashcard -> Flip card to see the back -> Rate recall quality by selecting Good -> POST /api/study/review is called -> See next card -> Repeat until no cards remain -> See session finished
Navigate to /study/:deckId -> GET /api/decks/:deckId/cards fails (network or server error) -> See error message indicating cards could not be loaded and option to retry
Navigate to /study/:deckId -> View front of flashcard -> Flip card to see the back -> Rate recall quality by selecting Again -> See the same card re-scheduled according to spaced-repetition rules

features.name: Dashboard (Folders & Decks)
features.description: Main app entry showing folders, recent decks, and creation actions; users can navigate into folders and decks and create new folders or decks from the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> GET /api/folders is called -> GET /api/decks is called -> View folders list -> View recent decks -> Click a folder item -> Navigate to /folder/:folderId -> See decks inside the folder
Navigate to / -> Click a deck item -> Navigate to /deck/:deckId -> See deck details and option to study -> Click Study button -> Navigate to /study/:deckId
Navigate to / -> Click Create New Folder button -> Fill folder name input -> Click Save -> POST /api/folders is called -> See new folder listed in folders list
Navigate to / -> Click Create New Deck button -> Fill deck name input -> Click Save -> POST /api/decks is called -> See new deck listed in recent decks

Navigate to / -> Click Create New Folder button -> Fill folder name input with an existing folder name -> Click Save -> POST /api/folders returns validation error -> See error message about duplicate folder name

routes.description: User login page with email and password
Main dashboard with folders and decks
Flashcard study mode for a specific deck
Interleaved study mode across multiple decks

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials
user_interactions: Fill email input field
Fill password input field
Click Login button to submit
See error message on invalid credentials
Redirect to dashboard on success

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new account with email and password
user_interactions: Fill email input field
Fill password input field
Click Register button
See validation errors if any

features.name: Focus Mode Drawer
features.description: A slide-in drawer from the right for Pomodoro-style focus sessions with a countdown timer, duration setting, start/stop controls, reward settings (custom dice labels), and today's stats
user_interactions: Open focus drawer from the sidebar/navigation button
Close drawer by clicking X button
Close drawer by clicking the backdrop overlay
Close drawer by pressing Escape key
Increase focus duration by clicking plus (+) button
Decrease focus duration by clicking minus (-) button
See duration displayed in minutes (or 1s for the shortest)
Click Start Focus button to start the timer
See timer countdown in MM:SS format
See circular SVG progress ring animate as time elapses
See status change from Ready to Focusing...
Duration stepper disappears while timer is running
Click Stop Session button to halt the timer early
View reward popup (dice roll animation) after session completes
Open settings panel by clicking the gear (Settings2) icon
Edit custom reward labels for each of the 6 dice faces
See dice icons (Dice1–Dice6) alongside each reward input

features.name: Flashcard Study Mode
features.description: Study flashcards using spaced repetition with flip animations
user_interactions: View front of flashcard
Flip card to see the back
Rate recall quality (Again / Hard / Good / Easy)
See next card
Finish session

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Main entry point showing folders and decks overview
user_interactions: View folders list
View recent decks
Navigate to a folder
Navigate to a deck
Create a new folder or deck

known_limitations.issue: FocusDrawer is globally mounted at app root level via lazy Suspense — it is always present in the DOM but hidden (translate-x-full) when closed
known_limitations.impact: Tests must trigger the drawer open state through the store or UI trigger to test visible state

known_limitations.issue: Reward popup uses Three.js 3D dice animation which requires WebGL
known_limitations.impact: Reward popup 3D animation may not render in headless browser environments
